title: Shikari Devi Temple
tagline: Shikari Devi Temple — spiritual town of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Shikari Devi Temple is a popular Hindu temple dedicated to goddess Durga in the form of Hunter's Goddess (in Hindi: Shikari Devi).
overview.description: Shikari Devi Temple is a popular Hindu temple dedicated to goddess Durga in the form of Hunter's Goddess (in Hindi: Shikari Devi). The temple is located 18 kilometres (11 mi) from Sanarli in Karsog valley and at the same distance from Janjheli which is on the other side of the hill, through steep road to the temple in Mandi district of the North Indian state of Himachal Pradesh. It is believed that the temple was established by the Pandavas during their exile at the time of Mahabharata.

topPlaces.name: Bhajji State
topPlaces.description: Bhajji state was a protected tributary state in the hills of Simla, now Himachal Pradesh, under the government of Punjab. Its area was 248 km² and the population (1881) of 12,106 and 1901 of 13,309 consisted almost entirely of Sikhs distributed in 327 villages.

topPlaces.name: Bagsiad
topPlaces.description: Bagsiad is a small town at altitude of 2000m which is a central area for two village panchayats (i.e. Sharan and Kandha-Bagsiad) in tehsil Thunag of Seraj constituency in district Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.

items.note: Bhajji state was a protected tributary state in the hills of Simla, now Himachal Pradesh, under the government of Punjab. Its area was 248 km² and the population (1881) of 12,106 and 1901 of 13,309 consisted almost entirely of Sikhs distributed in 327 villages.

Bagsiad is a small town at altitude of 2000m which is a central area for two village panchayats (i.e. Sharan and Kandha-Bagsiad) in tehsil Thunag of Seraj constituency in district Mandi, Himachal Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shikari Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shikari Devi Temple is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shikari Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shikari Devi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shikari Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shikari Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shikari Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shikari Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhajji State, Bagsiad.
